text: Certifications: SOC 2 Type II (Security, Availability, Confidentiality), ISO 27001. Reports are available under NDA. Scope covers our SaaS platform (API, web app, data processing). Auditor: [recognized firm]. Audit period: [dates]. Next audit scheduled: [date].

Our SOC 2 Type II includes TSC: Security, Availability, and Confidentiality. We provide the full report under NDA, including control descriptions, tests, and results, along with a bridge letter for the current period.
Scope exclusions are clearly documented (e.g., mobile app not in scope). We disclose these in the report and are pursuing additional coverage with expected completion timelines.
Any audit exceptions are disclosed with remediation plans and timelines. We track remediation to closure and provide evidence of fixes in subsequent audits.
We are SOC 2 and ISO 27001 certified, but do not provide details on type, scope, audit period, or auditor.
We can share a summary of our certifications, but full reports are not readily available or require extended processes.
Certifications apply to our platform broadly, though exact scope boundaries and exclusions are not clearly documented.
We have been audited, but details such as audit period, Trust Services Criteria, or exceptions are not clearly communicated.
We are SOC 2 compliant without specifying Type I or Type II or providing evidence.
We are currently working toward certification but do not yet hold it.
We are certified secure without referencing any recognized standards or audits.
We cannot provide certification reports or audit evidence.
